name: GIGABYTE B760 GAMING X AX DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.2 - HDMI 2.0 - Gigabit LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 802.11ac - BT 4.2
shortName: GIGABYTE B760 GAMING X AX DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 Intel processors with DDR4 support, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi connectivity.
